description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on workflow dispatch, push to non-tag branches like master, and pull requests to master. Run two jobs, e2e-tests and rust-tests, both on ubuntu-latest with a defi/ain-builder:latest container. The e2e-tests job checks out code, populates environment, installs dependencies, builds, and runs end-to-end tests. The rust-tests job checks out code, sets up dependencies, builds, and runs Rust tests.
